name: /merge
description: Automates the integration of a completed Step 5 feature branch or specific stable commit from its local worktree into the 'main' worktree and pushes the changes to origin, without executing any LLM turns or consuming API tokens.

usage.desc: Optional commit hash, branch, or reference to merge (default: HEAD).

examples.desc: Safely verify, merge, and push the HEAD commit into main.
Verify, merge, and push the specific stable Step 5 commit (638e9b4) into main.
